caption: A man wearing glasses, a white button-down shirt with a red bowtie, and a tall, spiked grey wig sits in a room decorated with numerous small framed pictures on the wall. He wears over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional black microphone positioned in front of him. In the background, clothing items and hangers are visible. A logo featuring a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" appears on the screen. As the sequence progresses, the man's facial expressions shift slightly as he speaks, with his mouth opening and closing. He remains in the same seated position throughout, maintaining his focus toward someone or something off-camera to the left. The lighting remains consistent, and the camera angle stays fixed on the man from the chest up.
